mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_page_view (user_id, page_path, page_name, occurred_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{pagePath}, #{pageName}, #{occurredAt})
mapper.select: SELECT page_name AS pageName, CASE WHEN #{mode} = 'hour' THEN LPAD(HOUR(occurred_at), 2, '0') WHEN #{mode} = 'dayOfWeek' THEN DAYOFWEEK(occurred_at) WHEN #{mode} = 'date' THEN DATE_FORMAT(occurred_at, '%m-%d') WHEN #{mode} = 'week' THEN DATE_FORMAT(occurred_at, '%x-W%v') END AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS pv FROM sys_page_view WHERE occurred_at >= #{fromTs} AND occurred_at <= #{toTs} GROUP BY page_name, bucket
SELECT page_name AS pageName, COUNT(*) AS totalVisits FROM sys_page_view WHERE occurred_at >= #{fromTs} AND occurred_at <= #{toTs} GROUP BY page_name ORDER BY totalVisits DESC
